---
title: "HW1 (Titanic Dataset)"
date: today
author: Tsung-Yu Lee
format:
 pdf:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
         \usepackage{setspace,relsize}
mainfont: "Microsoft JhengHei UI"
toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE) 
```

# Summary statistics

Load the titanic_train dataset in r package "titanic".

```{r}
library(titanic)
titanic_train[titanic_train == ""] <- NA
```

Explore the titanic_train dataset by using latex(describe()) function,

```{r}
#| output: asis
library(Hmisc)
latex(describe(titanic_train), file = "", caption.placement = "top")
```

\newpage
# Table 1
Display some table 1s' by variable "Survived".

```{r}
library(table1)
table1(~ Pclass+Sex+Age+SibSp+Parch+Fare+Embarked|Survived, data = titanic_train)
```
\newpage
# Missing Pattern
Display missing patterns of each variable in titanic_train dataset.

```{r}
library(DataExplorer)
plot_missing(titanic_train)
```
